title: When a status change to something move board to folder
excerpt:
Hello, 
I couldn’t find the automation: “when a status change to something then move the current board to the folder”, is it possible to do?

posts.author: Hagar (Hagar Erlichman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I couldn’t find the automation: “when a status change to something then move the current board to the folder”, is it possible to do?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Hagar,

This automation recipe isn’t currently supported natively in the platform I am afraid! We encourage you to submit your feature request here so that other community members can upvote this request and get it on our developers radar
